text.message: Rob what's your point goal. 2k in itself is hard
do you know what happened on the last day of last season? :D
didnt play much last season so no :p
but I think I know since it happened to me the season before
was at 2032 and ushpuppy overtook me last day and got 2036 and rank 1
but its my own fault. didn't play for like 2 months after getting #1 temporarily
right lol i thought i was safe with 2032
so i guess aim is to beat that :D
where would you guys place first on this map?  could not figure it out.
no wheat.  thought about 6-3-4, but worried about what i get at the end.
I accepted he didnt take it
looked like u declined but ok
will rob you in teh guture
I accepted then I zoned out tbh
but why do i need to move it?
cause light blue is crushing us
is light blue still crushing us?
lol.  ok.  guess you understand game at a higher level than me :)
yeah i think i was falling too far behind
like im on 0 knights while you guys have 2 devs each and i cant build either
Does more wheat really help tho
yeah i dont get any otherwise lol
You’re on the best wheat already
lol, wasn't even thinkin about plowing ya
but ya can't know i guess
I just dont feel like playing a dev on 0 cards
with red placing it back on me
What dev are you gonna unleash
i mean, i can just steal from you
Light blue has rb I bet too
thats just not how you play
hope u dont lose to many rankpoints Robijs
It’s not too late to solo the 8 brick
it was too late after red didnt move it from 3 wheat
i hate to break it to you but you wont win
pretty emotional guy for #1.  not what i expected :)
Red you’re not supposed to play like that
